tasks.instruction: Book a free trial for an adult beginner class that meets on Tuesday at or after 7:00 pm, then complete the request form using the provided contact details and a Tuesday date in the next calendar month.

tasks.instruction: From the adult membership options, request the cheapest plan that costs no more than $120 per month, includes at least 12 classes per month, and has no long-term contract, using the provided contact details and choosing the first day of next month as the preferred start date.

tasks.instruction: Find weekday beginner classes for kids ages 7–12 that start at or after 4:00 pm, then join the waitlist for the highest-rated option using the provided contact details for a 9-year-old child.
